user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Daily automation: Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected. Account: Pacific Northwest Outfitters.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Andrew Taylor <andrew.taylor@pacificnorth.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-14 15:46 EST
Subject: whitespace analysis - Action Required

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with whitespace analysis. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Andrew Taylor <andrew.taylor@pacificnorth.com>
Date: 2024-02-08 08:23 EST
Subject: Follow-up: whitespace analysis Review

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about whitespace analysis. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Andrew Taylor <andrew.taylor@pacificnorth.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-28 11:23 EST
Subject: URGENT: whitespace analysis Issue at Pacific Northwest Outfitters

Just checking in on the whitespace analysis proposal. Our IT Director is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

Meeting: whitespace analysis Discussion - Pacific Northwest Outfitters
Date: 2024-02-05
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Andrew Taylor (Pacific Northwest Outfitters), Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft), David (Pacific Northwest Outfitters)

[00:01:15] Andrew Taylor (Pacific Northwest Outfitters): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is whitespace analysis.

[00:07:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about integration complexity. Can we address those?

[00:12:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): On the whitespace analysis front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around technical validation.

[00:15:00] David (Pacific Northwest Outfitters): The timeline for data residency is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:20:00] David (Pacific Northwest Outfitters): The timeline for budget approval is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:24:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on performance requirements and found that the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy.

[00:26:00] Andrew Taylor (Pacific Northwest Outfitters): On the whitespace analysis front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around vendor dependencies.

[00:30:00] Andrew Taylor (Pacific Northwest Outfitters): The timeline for technical validation is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:32:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): The timeline for performance requirements is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:36:00] David (Pacific Northwest Outfitters): Let me add some context -- we've been working on partner engagement and found that the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk.
